mission.title: modelpack: help docker-runner compatible with modelpack
mission.description: help docker-runner compatible with modelpack. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current modelpack deployment
steps.description:
Verify your modelpack version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n modelpack -l app.kubernetes.io/name=modelpack
helm list -n modelpack 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working modelpack installation.

steps.title: Review modelpack configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant modelpack configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n modelpack -l app.kubernetes.io/name=modelpack
kubectl get configmap -n modelpack -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=modelpack
```
### Feature request:

See: https://github.com/docker/model-spec/issues/3

steps.title: Apply the fix for help docker-runner compatible with modelpack
steps.description:
There initial modelpack support has been merged in docker model runner: https://github.com/docker/model-runner/pull/516

The leftover being:
```yaml
docker model run ignaciolopezluna020/smollm2:v1.0.0
> hello
hello
> who are you?
Hello! I'm your AI companion. I'm here to help with your daily tasks.
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n modelpack -l app.kubernetes.io/name=modelpack
kubectl get events -n modelpack --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "help docker-runner compatible with modelpack" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
There initial modelpack support has been merged in docker model runner: https://github.com/docker/model-runner/pull/516

The leftover being:
codeSnippets:
docker model run ignaciolopezluna020/smollm2:v1.0.0
> hello
hello
> who are you?
Hello! I'm your AI companion. I'm here to help with your daily tasks.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with modelpack installed or the issue environment reproducible.
